message.content:
@startuml
title create order sequence diagram

actor Customer
actor Cashier

participant ":Inventory System"
participant ":Order"
participant ":Product"
participant ":Stock"
participant ":Invoice"
participant ":Transaction"

Customer -> Cashier: 1. Request order product
Cashier --> Customer: 2. Receive order

Cashier -> :Inventory System: 3. requestCreateOrder()

:Inventory System -> :Product: 3.1 selectProduct()
:Product -> :Stock: 3.2 checkStock()
:Stock --> :Product: 3.3 return stock
:Product --> :Inventory System: 3.4 return product

alt [IF (stock.qty > order.qty)]
  :Inventory System -> :Order: 3.5 createOrder(order)
  :Order -> :Stock: 3.6 updateStock()
  :Stock --> :Order: 3.7 return update stock
  :Order -> :Invoice: 3.8 systemCreateInvoice()
  :Invoice -> :Invoice: 3.9 printInvoice()
  :Invoice --> :Order: 3.10 return invoice
  :Order --> :Inventory System: 3.11 return order
else [ELSE]
  :Order --> :Inventory System: 3.12 can't create order
end

:Inventory System --> Cashier: 4. response create order status
Cashier --> Customer: 5. Invoice

@enduml
